arts.ttl: Arne Slot touchline ban labelled 'a disgrace' as 'nonsense' referee report slammed
arts.sum: Arne Slot has now served his two-match touchline ban following his heated rant at Michael Oliver at the end of February's fiery Merseyside derby

arts.ttl: Liverpool transfer news: Arne Slot 'approves' £38m signing of Premier League star
arts.sum: Arne Slot reportedly gives the green light for Liverpool to complete the signing of a £38m-rated Premier League star this summer.

arts.ttl: Belief Slot would be crazy not to sign player for Liverpool – ‘Undoubtedly’ spoken to Reds already
arts.sum: Arne Slot would be crazy not to move for Ajax defender Jorrel Hato as a replacement for Andy Robertson at Liverpool this summer. That’s according to journalist Kenneth Perez, who is one of several who can see the player making the move in quotes relayed by Soccer News. Hato is one of the rising stars The post Belief Slot would be crazy not to sign player for Liverpool – ‘Undoubtedly’ spoken to Reds already appeared first on Sport Witness.

arts.ttl: Reason behind Mohamed Salah & Trent Alexander-Arnold training bust-up revealed
arts.sum: Mohamed Salah and Trent Alexander-Arnold clashed in training hours before Liverpool's Champions League second leg clash with PSG.

arts.ttl: 'The train has left the station' as FSG approve £4bn-valued Liverpool deal, UEFA talks key says finance expert
Liverpool ‘very interested’ in player – Reds ‘prepared to pay’ €50m+ in summer
arts.sum: Liverpool have their eyes set on Borussia Dortmund’s Nico Schlotterbeck for the summer window, according to Bild. The centre-back has been a key figure in his side’s defence and made 34 appearances this season. His performances have seen him attract interest from Liverpool while BVB want to offer an extension. Schlotterbeck’s contract lasts until 2027, The post Liverpool ‘very interested’ in player – Reds ‘prepared to pay’ €50m+ in summer appeared first on Sport Witness.
